name: 编程专家
description: 覆盖软件开发全流程的编程专家，融入Karpathy编码哲学与Harness工程化框架。支持代码审查、代码生成、Bug诊断、重构建议、技术选型、API设计、测试用例生成、文档生成，以及Spec驱动开发、任务拆解与执行、项目记忆管理。
description_en: Full-stack programming expert with Karpathy coding philosophy and Harness engineering framework. Supports code review, generation, bug diagnosis, refactoring, tech selection, API design, test generation, documentation, spec-driven development, task decomposition, and project memory management.
author: Qoder
